title: Microservices Platforms - part 7: Deployment platform
description: The Deployment platform provides production and production-like environments, infrastructure-as-code modules for provisioning them, and reusable Helm templates so that service teams can focus on delivering business value rather than being burdened with managing deployment environments.

title: GenAI-based development platform - part 3: Announcing Isolarium, three flavors of secure sandboxes for GenAI-based coding agents
description: Announcing Isolarium, an open-source tool that provides three flavors of secure sandboxes - Nono, container, and virtual machine - for running GenAI-based coding agents like Claude Code in isolated environments.

title: Microservices Platforms - part 6: Build platform
description: The Build platform provides deployment pipeline infrastructure, reusable pipeline components, and pipeline templates so that service teams can focus on delivering business value rather than being burdened with setting up and managing deployment pipelines.

title: GenAI-based development platform - part 2: How Idea to Code turns an idea into working, tested software
description: How the Idea to Code 'implement' command orchestrates Claude Code to turn a plan into a pull request, using TDD, automatic CI failure recovery, and PR review handling in an iterative loop.

title: GenAI-based development platform - part 1: guardrails
description: How pre-commit checklists, Git hooks, GitHub Actions workflows, and automated PR reviews provide defense in depth for GenAI-based coding agents

title: Why GenAI-based coding agents are a complex domain in Cynefin - and what that means for adoption
description: Using GenAI-based coding agents is a complex domain in Cynefin terms: the relationship between prompt and outcome cannot be fully predicted, and effective practices emerge through experimentation rather than upfront analysis. Organizations must shift from top-down standardization to a platform strategy that amplifies learning through safe-to-fail experiments, rapid feedback, and shared emerging patterns.

title: Authentication and authorization in a microservice architecture: Part 6 - implementing complex authorization using Oso Cloud local authorization
description: Oso Cloud local authorization enables a microservice to make authorization decisions using a combination of facts stored in Oso Cloud and the service's local database. listLocal() returns SQL WHERE clause fragments for bulk queries, and authorizeLocal() returns SQL SELECT statements for single-entity operations.

title: QCONSF Microservices Platforms - part 4: Infrastructure services platform
GenAI-based software delivery needs a fast flow architecture
description: GenAI-based software development is an amplifier of organizational capabilities. Fast flow is therefore not optional, but essential. What's more, the microservice architecture provides the boundaries and fast feedback that GenAI-based coding agents need.
